Cabinet des Médailles, Paris|link=Sealstone of Mani]] |listclass = hlist |above =
|group1 = Prophets |list1 = * [[:en:Mani (prophet)|Mani]] (Founder) * [[Ebisukazu Ōkami|Jesus]] * [[The Buddha in Manichaeism|Sakyamuni]] * [[Zarathustra in Manichaeism|Zarathustra]] * [[Narayana]] * [[Seth]]
|group2 = [[:en:Manichaean scripture|Scripture]] |list2 = * [[Seven treatises of Manichaeism]] ([[:en:Gospel of Mani|Gospel of Mani]], [[Treasure of Life]], [[The Epistles (Manichaeism)|The Epistles]], [[The Book of Mysteries (Manichaeism)|The Book of Mysteries]], [[Pragmateia]], [[The Book of Giants]], [[Psalms and Prayers]]) * ''[[:en:Arzhang|Book of Pictures]]'' * ''[[Shabuhragan]]''
|group3 = Extracanonical</br> literature |list3 = * [[:en:New Testament|New Testament]] * [[:en:Fundamental Epistle|Fundamental Epistle]] * [[:en:Manichaean Psalm Book|Manichaean Psalm Book]] * [[Psalms of Thomas]] * [[:en:Kephalaia|Kephalaia]] * [[Xuastvanift]] * [[:en:Cologne Mani-Codex|Cologne Mani-Codex]] * [[Medinet Madi library]] * [[:en:Dunhuang Manichaean texts|Dunhuang Manichaean texts]] ** [[Xiabuzan]] ** [[:en:Manichaean Compendium|Manichaean Compendium]] ** [[:en:Incomplete scripture of Manichaeism|Incomplete scripture of Manichaeism]] ** [[:en:Irk Bitig|Irk Bitig]]† * [[Turpan Manichaean texts]] ** [[Sogdian-language Manichaean letter]] * [[Xiapu Manichaean manuscripts]] ** ''[[Moni Guangfo]]''
|group4 = [[Manichaean theology|Theology]] |list4 = * [[:en:Father of Greatness|Father of Greatness]] * [[Prince of Darkness (Manichaeism)|Prince of Darkness]] * [[Zarathustra in Manichaeism]] * [[The Buddha in Manichaeism]] * [[Ebisukazu Ōkami]] * [[Two Principles and Three Moments]] * [[:en:Gnosis|Gnosis]] * [[:en:Mani (prophet)|Messenger of Light]] * [[Xroshtag and Padvaxtag]] * [[Archon (Gnosticism)#Manichaeism|''Archon'']] * [[:en:Asrestar|Asrestar]]
|group5 = [[Manichaeism#History|History]] |list5 = * [[:en:Apostles (Manichaeism)|Apostles]] * [[Mar Ammo]] * [[Mar Sisin]] * [[:en:Akouas|Mar Zaku]] * [[Mar Adda]] * [[Shad Ohrmazd]] * [[Mihr (Manichaeism)|Mihr]] * [[:en:Faustus of Mileve|Faustus]] * [[:en:Agapius (Manichaean)|Agapius]] * [[:en:Aphthonius of Alexandria|Aphthonius]] * [[:en:Hegemonius|Hegemonius]] * [[Marcus (Manichean)|Marcus]] * ''[[Three Persian religions]]'' * [[:en:Huichang Persecution of Buddhism|Huichang Persecution of Manichaeism]] * [[:en:Bögü Qaghan|Bögü Qaghan]] * [[Sergius-Tychicus]] * [[:en:East–West schism (Manichaeism)|East-West Schism]] * [[:en:Amr ibn Adi|Amr ibn Adi]] * [[:en:Abū Hilāl al-Dayhūri|Abū Hilāl al-Dayhūri]] * [[:en:Lü Shinang|Lü Shinang]] * [[Synod of Gangra]] * [[:en:Lin Deng|Lin Deng]] * [[Manichaeism#Persecution and extinction|Persecution]] * [[Uyghur Khaganate]] * [[:en:Cangnan Stele|Cangnan Stele]] * [[Qianku]]
|group6 = Sects |list6 = * [[See of Babylon (Manichaeism)|See of Babylon]] * [[:en:Denawars|Denawars]] * [[:en:Astati|Astati]] * [[:en:Chinese Manichaeism|Chinese Manichaeism]] * [[:en:Manichaean schisms|Miqlāsiyya]]
|group7 = [[Manichaeism#The Manichaean Church|Organisation]] |list7 = * [[:en:Archegos (Manichaeism)|Archegos]] * Patriarch * Apostle * Bishop * Presbyter * Elect * Hearers
|group8 = Commandments |list8 = * [[Three Seals (Manichaeism)|Three Seals]] <!-- * [[Five Pure Precepts]] * [[Seven Practices]] * [[Ten Precepts (Manichaeism)|Ten Precepts]] * [[Twelve Dharma Signs]] * [[Fifteen Repentances]] --> * [[Pañcavidyā]]
|group9 = Rituals |list9 = * [[:en:Eucharist|Eucharist]] * [[:en:evangelism|evangelism]] * [[Repentance]] * [[:en:Fasting|Fasting]]
|group10 = Buildings |list10 = * [[:en:Cao'an|Cao'an]] * {{ill|Puxi Fushou Palace|zh|浦西境福寿宫|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Puxi Fushou Palace|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Puxi Fushou Palace|qq=}} * {{ill|Flying Road Pagoda|zh|飞路塔|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Flying Road Pagoda|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Flying Road Pagoda|qq=}} * {{ill|Leshan Temple|zh|乐山堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Leshan Temple|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Leshan Temple|qq=}}
|group11 = [[:en:Manichaean art|Visual art]] |list11 = * ''[[:en:Birth of Mani|Birth of Mani]]'' * ''[[:en:Arzhang|Book of Pictures]]'' * ''[[:en:Manichaean Diagram of the Universe|Diagram of the Universe]]'' * ''[[:en:Episodes from Mani's Missionary Work|Episodes from Mani's Missionary Work]]'' * ''[[:en:Icon of Mani|Icon of Mani]]'' * [[:en:Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4959|Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4959]] * [[:en:Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4974|Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4974]] * [[:en:Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4979|Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4979]] * [[:en:Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 6368|Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 6368]] * [[:en:Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 8259|Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 8259]] * ''[[:en:Mani's Community Established|Mani's Community Established]]'' * ''[[:en:Mani's Parents|Mani's Parents]]'' * [[:en:Manichaean stone reliefs of Shangwan village|Manichaean stone reliefs of Shangwan village]] * [[Manichaean temple banner MIK III 6286]] * [[Manichaean wall painting MIK III 6918]] * ''[[:en:Manichaean Painting of the Buddha Jesus|Painting of the Buddha Jesus]]'' * [[Sealstone of Mani]] * ''[[Sermon on Mani's Teaching of Salvation]]'' * ''[[Veneration of the Tree of Life]]''
|group12 = Writing system |list12 = * [[:en:Manichaean script|Manichaean script]] * [[:en:Manichaean (Unicode block)|Manichaean (Unicode block)]]
|group13 = In fiction |list13 = * [[Ming Cult]] * ''[[The Gardens of Light]]'' * ''[[Story of the Twin Dragons of Great Tang]]'' * ''[[The Secret of Heaven]]''
|belowstyle = |below = ''Notes'': † mainly a Tengrist text but recorded in a Manichaean monastery
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Manichaeism]] </noinclude>

Cabinet des Médailles, Paris|link=Sealstone of Mani]] |listclass = hlist |above =
|group1 = Prophets |list1 = * [[:en:Mani (prophet)|Mani]] (Founder) * [[Ebisukazu Ōkami|Jesus]] * [[:en:The Buddha in Manichaeism|Sakyamuni]] * [[:en:Zarathustra in Manichaeism|Zarathustra]] * [[:en:Narayana|Narayana]] * [[:en:Seth|Seth]]

|group3 = Extracanonical</br> literature |list3 = * [[:en:New Testament|New Testament]] * [[:en:Fundamental Epistle|Fundamental Epistle]] * [[:en:Manichaean Psalm Book|Manichaean Psalm Book]] * [[:en:Psalms of Thomas|Psalms of Thomas]] * [[:en:Kephalaia|Kephalaia]] * [[:en:Xuastvanift|Xuastvanift]] * [[:en:Cologne Mani-Codex|Cologne Mani-Codex]] * [[:en:Medinet Madi library|Medinet Madi library]] * [[:en:Dunhuang Manichaean texts|Dunhuang Manichaean texts]] ** [[:en:Xiabuzan|Xiabuzan]] ** [[:en:Manichaean Compendium|Manichaean Compendium]] ** [[:en:Incomplete scripture of Manichaeism|Incomplete scripture of Manichaeism]] ** [[:en:Irk Bitig|Irk Bitig]]† * [[Turpan Manichaean texts]] ** [[Sogdian-language Manichaean letter]] * [[:en:Xiapu Manichaean manuscripts|Xiapu Manichaean manuscripts]] ** ''[[:en:Moni Guangfo|Moni Guangfo]]''
|group4 = [[:en:Manichaean theology|Theology]] |list4 = * [[:en:Father of Greatness|Father of Greatness]] * [[:en:Prince of Darkness (Manichaeism)|Prince of Darkness]] * [[:en:Zarathustra in Manichaeism|Zarathustra in Manichaeism]] * [[:en:The Buddha in Manichaeism|The Buddha in Manichaeism]] * [[Ebisukazu Ōkami]] * [[Two Principles and Three Moments]] * [[:en:Gnosis|Gnosis]] * [[:en:Mani (prophet)|Messenger of Light]] * [[:en:Xroshtag and Padvaxtag|Xroshtag and Padvaxtag]] * [[Archon (Gnosticism)#Manichaeism|''Archon'']] * [[:en:Asrestar|Asrestar]]

|group8 = Commandments |list8 = * [[:en:Three Seals (Manichaeism)|Three Seals]] <!-- * [[Five Pure Precepts]] * [[Seven Practices]] * [[Ten Precepts (Manichaeism)|Ten Precepts]] * [[Twelve Dharma Signs]] * [[Fifteen Repentances]] --> * [[:en:Pañcavidyā|Pañcavidyā]]
|group9 = Rituals |list9 = * [[:en:Eucharist|Eucharist]] * [[:en:evangelism|evangelism]] * [[:en:Repentance|Repentance]] * [[:en:Fasting|Fasting]]
|group10 = Buildings |list10 = * [[:en:Cao'an|Cao'an]] * {{ill|Puxi Fushou Palace|zh|浦西境福寿宫|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Puxi Fushou Palace|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Puxi Fushou Palace|qq=}} * {{ill|Flying Road Pagoda|zh|飞路塔|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Flying Road Pagoda|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Flying Road Pagoda|qq=}} * {{ill|Leshan Temple|zh|乐山堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Leshan Temple|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Leshan Temple|qq=}}
|group11 = [[:en:Manichaean art|Visual art]] |list11 = * ''[[:en:Birth of Mani|Birth of Mani]]'' * ''[[:en:Arzhang|Book of Pictures]]'' * ''[[:en:Manichaean Diagram of the Universe|Diagram of the Universe]]'' * ''[[:en:Episodes from Mani's Missionary Work|Episodes from Mani's Missionary Work]]'' * ''[[:en:Icon of Mani|Icon of Mani]]'' * [[:en:Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4959|Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4959]] * [[:en:Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4974|Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4974]] * [[:en:Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4979|Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 4979]] * [[:en:Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 6368|Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 6368]] * [[:en:Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 8259|Leaf from a Manichaean book MIK III 8259]] * ''[[:en:Mani's Community Established|Mani's Community Established]]'' * ''[[:en:Mani's Parents|Mani's Parents]]'' * [[:en:Manichaean stone reliefs of Shangwan village|Manichaean stone reliefs of Shangwan village]] * [[:en:Manichaean temple banner MIK III 6286|Manichaean temple banner MIK III 6286]] * [[:en:Manichaean wall painting MIK III 6918|Manichaean wall painting MIK III 6918]] * ''[[:en:Manichaean Painting of the Buddha Jesus|Painting of the Buddha Jesus]]'' * [[:en:Sealstone of Mani|Sealstone of Mani]] * ''[[:en:Sermon on Mani's Teaching of Salvation|Sermon on Mani's Teaching of Salvation]]'' * ''[[:en:Veneration of the Tree of Life|Veneration of the Tree of Life]]''
|group12 = Writing system |list12 = * [[:en:Manichaean script|Manichaean script]] * [[:en:Manichaean (Unicode block)|Manichaean (Unicode block)]]
|group13 = In fiction |list13 = * [[:en:Ming Cult|Ming Cult]] * ''[[:en:The Gardens of Light|The Gardens of Light]]'' * ''[[:en:Story of the Twin Dragons of Great Tang|Story of the Twin Dragons of Great Tang]]'' * ''[[:en:The Secret of Heaven|The Secret of Heaven]]''
|belowstyle = |below = ''Notes'': † mainly a Tengrist text but recorded in a Manichaean monastery
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Manichaeism]] </noinclude>
